metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace — dev-kit (.NET/Vue tech lead toolkit with SDLC workflow), kit-maker (build and audit Claude Code plugins), and git-kit (git CLI toolkit).

plugins.name: dev-kit
plugins.description: Production-ready .NET Clean Architecture + Vue/TypeScript developer toolkit. CQRS, EF Core, Minimal APIs, SignalR, Serilog+Seq, CI/CD pipeline generation, Atlassian MCP integration, and full tech lead workflow (epics, SDRs, refinement, SDLC compliance, PR prep, standup).

plugins.name: kit-maker
plugins.description: Meta-kit for creating, auditing, and publishing marketplace-ready Claude Code plugins. Includes skill scaffolding, kit health checks, and quality standards.

plugins.name: git-kit
plugins.description: Git CLI toolkit — smarter commits, branching, rebase, conflict resolution, stash, undo, repo health, and hooks. Includes installable git hooks (commit-msg validator, pre-push guard) and two specialist agents (git-historian, git-surgeon).
